title: costera cyclophylla
intro: Costera cyclophylla is a type of plant native to tropical regions, belonging to the family Rubiaceae, and is also known as the 'Siberian Ginseng of the Philippines'. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the health benefits associated with Costera cyclophylla include improved cognitive function, enhanced immune system, and reduced stress levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
